arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. PSG: Official Starting Lineups for Second Leg in Champions League
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will be looking to overcome a 1-0 aggregate deficit against Liverpool at Anfield, and now the starting 11 for the two sides are revealed. The home side will be looking to at least hold onto their advantage if not increase their lead. arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate 'privately admits he SHOULD have been' sent off against PSG last week - after Liverpool star's clumsy challenge on Bradley Barcola
arts.sum: Konate, 25, played the full 90 minutes of the Champions League last-16 clash on Wednesday as Liverpool secured a remarkable 1-0 victory despite PSG dominating the clash.
